log_template_t(3) Library Functions Manual log_template_t(3)

NAME

log_template_t - Compiled log format ready for use in log_template_apply().

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/log/format.h>

Data Fields


log_format_spec_t * specs
size_t spec_count
char * original
bool console_only

Detailed Description

Compiled log format ready for use in log_template_apply().

Definition at line 66 of file log/format.h.
